name: /doctor token-cost reports the per-rule cache hit rate from the rule-cache statistics file
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/cache && printf '{"rule":"no-eval","hits":80,"misses":20}\n{"rule":"no-console","hits":50,"misses":50}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/cache/stats.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --report token-cost --by rule-cache 2>out.txt && grep -q 'rule=no-eval cache_hit_rate=0.80' out.txt && grep -q 'rule=no-console cache_hit_rate=0.50' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
